facts.statement: Pathways with larger gene ratios and stronger significance annotations are directionally consistent with the upregulated immune processes and downregulated cell-cycle programs, and the panel can be sourced directly from the active fgsea export rather than a hand-maintained summary table.

design_notes: Dot size should encode pathway gene count, and color should encode directionality.
Numeric significance labels should remain legible without overpowering the pathway names.
When generated input is present, provenance should remain visible so reviewers can trace the panel back to the active fgsea profile.
